title: Security Awareness Training
scenario: Create a security awareness training module for employees to educate them on best practices for secure password management. The module should include a brief overview of password security, reasons why password security is important, and tips for creating strong passwords. The module should be concise and not exceed 500 words.
constraints: Must include a brief overview of password security
Must provide tips for creating strong passwords

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated module meets all the constraints.
Evaluate the tone of the module to ensure it is informative and engaging.
Verify that the information provided is accurate and up-to-date.
